The advice of ungodly people harms many young people when they begin their lives in the world. Ahaziah allowed himself to be led by evil men. Those who advise us to do wrong counsel us to our destruction; while they pretend to be friends, they are our worst enemies. See and fear the harm of bad company. If not the influence, let the destruction be feared. Here, we have a wicked woman trying to destroy David’s house, and a good woman preserving it. No word of God will fail. The entire truth of the prophecies that the Messiah would come from David, and thereby bring salvation to the world, seemed now to hang on the fragile life of a single infant; destroying him was in the interest of the ruling power. But God had purposed, and all efforts of earth and hell were futile.
